logger.doc:name: LOG INFO: Start Flow
logger.message: Start: Global Error Handler: APIKIT ERROR

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST") (400) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_FOUND") (404) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") (405) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE") (406) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE") (415) else (500)

%dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::Strings --- { "source": vars.integration.source, "target": vars.integration.target, "env": capitalize(p('mule.env')), "integration-type": vars.integration."integration-type"
}

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v var errResp = vars.errorResponse default {} var sysInfo = vars.systemInformation default {} var integration = vars.integration default {} var cdm = (vars.initialPayload default [])[0].b2bMessage default {} var cdmHeader = cdm.header default {} var isValidationFlow = vars.isValid != null var errNs = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM" else (error.errorType.namespace default "UNKNOWN") var errId = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else (error.errorType.identifier default "ERROR") var errDesc = if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else (error.detailedDescription default error.description default "Unexpected error") var suppressed = if (isValidationFlow) null else (error.suppressedErrors[0] default null) var suppNs = suppressed.errorType.namespace default "" var suppId = suppressed.errorType.identifier default "" var sourceSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "APM" else safe(integration.source, "UNKNOWN") var targetSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "P21" else safe(integration.target, "UNKNOWN") var flowDirection = if (lower(sourceSystem) == "apm") "INBOUND" else "OUTBOUND" var categoryNs = if (suppressed != null and suppNs != "") suppNs else errNs var categoryId = if (suppressed != null and suppId != "") suppId else errId var errorTypeValue = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM:VALIDATION_ERROR" else if (suppressed != null and (suppNs != "" or suppId != "")) (if (suppNs != "") suppNs else "UNKNOWN") ++ ":" ++ (if (suppId != "") suppId else "ERROR") else if (!isEmpty(errResp.statusMessage default "")) errResp.statusMessage as String else errNs ++ ":" ++ errId var errorCategory = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION" else if (categoryNs == "CUSTOM" and categoryId == "P21_FAILED") "P21_ERROR" else if (categoryNs == "APIKIT" and suppressed == null) "APIKIT" else if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN" or categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED" or categoryNs == "OAUTH2" or categoryNs == "JWT" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and categoryId == "SECURITY")) "SECURITY" else if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED" or categoryId == "INVALID_INPUT" or categoryId == "UNRECOGNIZED_FIELD" or categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD" or categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR" or categoryNs == "VALIDATION" or categoryNs == "JSON" or categoryNs == "XML" or categoryNs == "CSV") "VALIDATION" else if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "BAD_GATEWAY" or categoryId == "CONNECTIVITY" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED" or categoryId == "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE" or categoryId == "REMOTELY_CLOSED" or categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "CONNECTIVITY" else if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND" or categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" or categoryId == "NOT_ACCEPTABLE" or categoryId == "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" or categoryId == "CONFLICT" or categoryId == "GONE" or categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "CLIENT_ERROR" else if (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "COERCION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION"))) "TRANSFORMATION" else if (categoryId == "ROUTING" or categoryId == "COMPOSITE_ROUTING" or categoryId == "FLOW_NOT_FOUND") "ROUTING" else "GENERIC" var errorTitle = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "P21 Integration Error" else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "API Error" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "Security Error" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "Validation Error" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "Connectivity Error" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "Client Error" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "Transformation Error" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "Routing Error" else "System Error" var bannerColor = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "#0369a1" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "#f97316" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "#6366f1" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "#06b6d4" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "#0ea5e9" else "#ef4444" var ve = vars.isValid.validationErrors default {} var itemRows = flatten( (ve.itemErrors default {}) pluck ((value, key) -> (value default []) map (err) -> "" ++ "Item (" ++ key ++ ")" ++ "" ++ err ++ "" ++ "" ) ) var carrierRows = (ve.carrierErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Carrier" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var externalPoRows = (ve.externalPoErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "External PO" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var customerPartRows = (ve.customerPartErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Customer Part" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var totalRows = (ve.totalErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Total" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var shipToRows = (ve.shipToErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Ship To" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var allRows = itemRows ++ carrierRows ++ externalPoRows ++ customerPartRows ++ totalRows ++ shipToRows var validationHtml = if (sizeOf(allRows) > 0) "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ (allRows joinBy "") ++ "
TypeError
" else "Validation failed but no detailed errors available." var errorResolution = if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") if (isValidationFlow) "The validation failed because the P21 data and the EDI data do not match. Please correct the EDI data accordingly and resend the file." else do { var baseMsg = "The incoming request payload from " ++ sourceSystem ++ " failed validation." var steps = if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED") "\n 1. Compare the received payload against the API RAML/OAS schema — identify the non-conforming fields." ++ "\n 2. Check for missing mandatory fields, incorrect data types, or values outside allowed enumerations." ++ "\n 3. Validate the payload manually using a schema validator tool before resubmitting." ++ "\n 4. Notify the sending system (" ++ sourceSystem ++ ") team to fix the payload structure." else if (categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD") "\n 1. A required field is absent — review the schema to identify which field(s) are mandatory." ++ "\n 2. Coordinate with " ++ sourceSystem ++ " to ensure all required fields are populated before sending." ++ "\n 3. If the field is conditionally required, review the business rules applied in the flow." else if (categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR") "\n 1. The payload could not be parsed — verify the Content-Type header matches the actual payload format." ++ "\n 2. Check for special characters, BOM markers, or encoding issues (ensure UTF-8)." ++ "\n 3. Validate the raw message body for malformed JSON/XML syntax." else "\n 1. Review the full error description to identify the failing field or rule." ++ "\n 2. Validate the payload structure against the published API contract." ++ "\n 3. Engage the source system team to correct the data before resubmitting." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Resubmission is safe only after the payload has been corrected." } else if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "A P21 (Prophet 21) integration failure occurred on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (contains(lower(errDesc), "invalid column") or contains(lower(errDesc), "column")) "\n 1. An invalid or unrecognized column was referenced in the P21 transaction — review the column name in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify that the column exists in the target P21 table (e.g., TP_POHDR) and is spelled correctly." ++ "\n 3. Check if a recent P21 schema upgrade removed or renamed the column — re-align the integration mapping." ++ "\n 4. Confirm the column is available in the P21 version deployed in the " ++ safe(sysInfo.env, "current") ++ " environment." ++ "\n 5. Run the transaction manually in P21 with the same payload to reproduce and isolate the column issue." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "general exception")) "\n 1. P21 raised a general exception — capture the full error description and transaction reference from the logs." ++ "\n 2. Reproduce the transaction manually in P21 to identify the root cause." ++ "\n 3. Check P21 application logs for the matching timestamp and transaction ID." ++ "\n 4. Verify the P21 service is healthy and the target table/object is not locked." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "transaction")) "\n 1. The P21 transaction failed to process — check the transaction ID referenced in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify the transaction data conforms to P21 business rules and required field constraints." ++ "\n 3. Check if a prior transaction left the record in a locked or incomplete state." ++ "\n 4. Review the P21 event log for any associated warnings or preceding failures." else "\n 1. Capture the full error description and correlation ID and search P21 application logs." ++ "\n 2. Verify the P21 endpoint is reachable and the target object/table is accessible." ++ "\n 3. Confirm the integration payload structure matches the P21 expected schema." ++ "\n 4. Engage the P21 support team with the correlation ID and error detail if the issue persists." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit the transaction without confirming whether it was partially committed in P21." } else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") do { var baseMsg = "Authentication or authorization failure detected on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED") "\n 1. Verify that the client credentials (username/password or client ID/secret) are valid and have not expired." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the token endpoint URL and grant type are correctly configured in the connector." ++ "\n 3. Check if the credentials were recently rotated — update the secret manager entry and re-deploy." ++ "\n 4. Review the HTTP Authorization header format (Bearer vs Basic)." else if (categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED") "\n 1. The identity is authenticated but lacks permission — review role/scope assignments in the target system." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the API client has the required scopes granted in API Manager." ++ "\n 3. Check IP allowlist or policy restrictions applied on the API." else if (categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN") "\n 1. Token has expired or is malformed — verify the token refresh logic in the integration flow." ++ "\n 2. Ensure system clock is synchronized (NTP) — clock skew can invalidate JWT tokens." ++ "\n 3. Check token TTL settings in the OAuth provider and align the refresh interval." else "\n 1. Review security policy configuration in API Manager for this API." ++ "\n 2. Inspect request headers for correct Authorization values." ++ "\n 3. Contact the API owner if credentials or scopes need to be re-provisioned." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT expose credentials in logs. Escalate to the security team if repeated failures are observed." } else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") do { var baseMsg = "A connectivity failure occurred while communicating with " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. Verify that " ++ targetSystem ++ " is running and reachable from the Mule runtime network." ++ "\n 2. Check firewall rules and security group policies for the target endpoint." ++ "\n 3. Review the connector timeout settings — increase if the target is known to be slow." ++ "\n 4. Inspect " ++ targetSystem ++ " server logs for signs of overload or long processing times." else if (categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. The connection was established but the operation timed out mid-transfer." ++ "\n 2. Increase read/write timeout values in the HTTP/connector configuration." ++ "\n 3. Check payload size — large payloads may require streaming or chunked transfer." else if (categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "\n 1. Verify the TLS/SSL certificate of " ++ targetSystem ++ " is valid and not expired." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the certificate is trusted — add it to the Mule truststore if self-signed." ++ "\n 3. Confirm TLS protocol versions are compatible (TLS 1.2/1.3)." ++ "\n 4. Check mutual TLS (mTLS) configuration if client certificates are required." else if (categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED") "\n 1. All retry attempts have been exhausted — " ++ targetSystem ++ " may be consistently unavailable." ++ "\n 2. Review the Until Successful / retry policy settings and adjust retry count and interval." ++ "\n 3. Consider implementing a dead-letter queue for failed messages." ++ "\n 4. Alert the " ++ targetSystem ++ " operations team to investigate availability." else "\n 1. Confirm network connectivity between Mule runtime and " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Verify the endpoint URL, port, and protocol are correctly configured." ++ "\n 3. Check infrastructure health dashboards for any active incidents." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n If the issue is intermittent, check for network instability or scheduled maintenance windows." } else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "The request was well-formed but could not be fulfilled by " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND") "\n 1. The requested resource does not exist on " ++ targetSystem ++ " — verify the resource ID or URI path." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the resource was not deleted or archived in the target system." ++ "\n 3. Check for environment-specific differences (Dev vs Prod resource IDs)." else if (categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") "\n 1. The HTTP method used is not supported for this endpoint — review the API documentation." ++ "\n 2. Verify the connector or HTTP request component is configured with the correct HTTP verb." else if (categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "\n 1. Rate limit has been exceeded for " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Implement exponential back-off and retry logic in the flow." ++ "\n 3. Review the API rate limit policy and consider requesting a quota increase." ++ "\n 4. Batch or throttle outbound requests to stay within allowed limits." else if (categoryId == "CONFLICT") "\n 1. A conflicting resource state was detected — the resource may already exist or be locked." ++ "\n 2. Check for duplicate transaction IDs or idempotency key conflicts." ++ "\n 3. Implement idempotency checks before sending create/update requests." else "\n 1. Review the HTTP status code and error description for specific guidance." ++ "\n 2. Verify the request parameters, headers, and body match the API contract." ++ "\n 3. Consult the " ++ targetSystem ++ " API documentation for this endpoint." --- baseMsg ++ steps } else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") do { var baseMsg = "A data transformation or mapping error occurred in the integration flow." var steps = if (categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED") "\n 1. Review the DataWeave script at the failing Transform component." ++ "\n 2. Validate that all referenced fields exist in the input payload — use 'default' guards for optional fields." ++ "\n 3. Test the mapping in DataWeave Playground or Anypoint Studio with a sample payload." ++ "\n 4. Add null-safety checks: use '?' operator and 'default' to handle missing or null values." else if (categoryId == "COERCION") "\n 1. A type coercion failed — verify the data type of the field being cast (e.g., String to Number)." ++ "\n 2. Check for empty strings, null values, or non-numeric characters in numeric fields." ++ "\n 3. Add explicit type guards before coercion: if (value is String and not isEmpty(value))." else "\n 1. Identify the failing Transform component using the Correlation ID in the application logs." ++ "\n 2. Log the input payload just before the transform to capture the actual data shape." ++ "\n 3. Verify the mapping handles all edge cases (null, empty, unexpected formats)." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Check if the source payload structure changed — upstream schema changes often cause silent mapping breaks." } else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "The request did not conform to the API specification." ++ "\n 1. Verify the request URI, HTTP method, headers, and query parameters match the RAML/OAS definition." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the Content-Type and Accept headers are set correctly." ++ "\n 3. Validate the request payload against the schema defined in the API spec." ++ "\n 4. Consult the API documentation or contact the API owner for the correct request format." else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "The integration flow could not route the message to its intended destination." ++ "\n 1. Verify that the target flow name is correct and the flow is deployed and active." ++ "\n 2. Check the routing logic (Choice/Scatter-Gather) for conditions that may not match the current payload." ++ "\n 3. Review the flow-ref component configuration for typos in the flow name." ++ "\n 4. Confirm there are no missing or disabled flows in the deployed application." else "An unexpected system error occurred during processing." ++ "\n 1. Capture the Correlation ID and search the application logs for the full stack trace." ++ "\n 2. Check Anypoint Monitoring or Runtime Manager for memory, CPU, or thread pool alerts." ++ "\n 3. Review recent deployments or configuration changes that may have introduced the issue." ++ "\n 4. If the issue persists, raise a support ticket with the Correlation ID, error type, and timestamp." var errorDescFull = if (isValidationFlow) validationHtml else (errResp.description default errDesc default "Unexpected error") as String ++ "\n\nCorrelation ID: " ++ (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) ++ "\nHTTP Status: " ++ ((errResp.statusCode default vars.httpStatus default 500) as String) ++ "\nStatus Message: " ++ (errResp.statusMessage default errorTypeValue) ++ "\nTimestamp: " ++ (errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"})) var corrId = if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId, uuid()) else (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) var data = { flowDirection: flowDirection, documentType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else safe(integration."integration-type", "API"), appName: p('api.name') default "Mule Application", transactionType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else (vars.systemInformation."integration-type" default "API"), environment: safe(sysInfo.env, p('mule.env')), flowName: safe(vars.flowName, "Global Error Handler"), route: sourceSystem ++ " → Mule → " ++ targetSystem, partnerName: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.senderId) else sourceSystem, errorTitle: errorTitle, bannerColor: bannerColor, errorType: errorTypeValue, errorCategory: errorCategory, status: "FAILED", errorCode: if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else errId, message: if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else "An unexpected error occurred during integration processing.", errorResolution: errorResolution, errorDescription: errorDescFull, transmissionId: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId) else (vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default corrId), keyLabel: if (isValidationFlow) "PO Number" else "Correlation ID", key: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.poNumber) else corrId, timestamp: errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}) } var template = readUrl("classpath://templates/error-template.html", "text/plain") --- template replace /\$\{(\w+)\}/ with ((m) -> (data[m[1]] as String) default "" )

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO: Start Flow
logger.message: Start: Global Error Handler: Validation ERROR

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v var errResp = vars.errorResponse default {} var sysInfo = vars.systemInformation default {} var integration = vars.integration default {} var cdm = (vars.initialPayload default [])[0].b2bMessage default {} var cdmHeader = cdm.header default {} var isValidationFlow = vars.isValid != null var errNs = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM" else (error.errorType.namespace default "UNKNOWN") var errId = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else (error.errorType.identifier default "ERROR") var errDesc = if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else (error.detailedDescription default error.description default "Unexpected error") var suppressed = if (isValidationFlow) null else (error.suppressedErrors[0] default null) var suppNs = suppressed.errorType.namespace default "" var suppId = suppressed.errorType.identifier default "" var sourceSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "APM" else safe(integration.source, "UNKNOWN") var targetSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "P21" else safe(integration.target, "UNKNOWN") var flowDirection = if (lower(sourceSystem) == "apm") "INBOUND" else "OUTBOUND" var categoryNs = if (suppressed != null and suppNs != "") suppNs else errNs var categoryId = if (suppressed != null and suppId != "") suppId else errId var errorTypeValue = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM:VALIDATION_ERROR" else if (suppressed != null and (suppNs != "" or suppId != "")) (if (suppNs != "") suppNs else "UNKNOWN") ++ ":" ++ (if (suppId != "") suppId else "ERROR") else if (!isEmpty(errResp.statusMessage default "")) errResp.statusMessage as String else errNs ++ ":" ++ errId var errorCategory = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION" else if (categoryNs == "CUSTOM" and categoryId == "P21_FAILED") "P21_ERROR" else if (categoryNs == "APIKIT" and suppressed == null) "APIKIT" else if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN" or categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED" or categoryNs == "OAUTH2" or categoryNs == "JWT" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and categoryId == "SECURITY")) "SECURITY" else if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED" or categoryId == "INVALID_INPUT" or categoryId == "UNRECOGNIZED_FIELD" or categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD" or categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR" or categoryNs == "VALIDATION" or categoryNs == "JSON" or categoryNs == "XML" or categoryNs == "CSV") "VALIDATION" else if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "BAD_GATEWAY" or categoryId == "CONNECTIVITY" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED" or categoryId == "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE" or categoryId == "REMOTELY_CLOSED" or categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "CONNECTIVITY" else if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND" or categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" or categoryId == "NOT_ACCEPTABLE" or categoryId == "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" or categoryId == "CONFLICT" or categoryId == "GONE" or categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "CLIENT_ERROR" else if (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "COERCION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION"))) "TRANSFORMATION" else if (categoryId == "ROUTING" or categoryId == "COMPOSITE_ROUTING" or categoryId == "FLOW_NOT_FOUND") "ROUTING" else "GENERIC" var errorTitle = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "P21 Integration Error" else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "API Error" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "Security Error" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "Validation Error" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "Connectivity Error" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "Client Error" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "Transformation Error" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "Routing Error" else "System Error" var bannerColor = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "#0369a1" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "#f97316" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "#6366f1" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "#06b6d4" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "#0ea5e9" else "#ef4444" var ve = vars.isValid.validationErrors default {} var itemRows = flatten( (ve.itemErrors default {}) pluck ((value, key) -> (value default []) map (err) -> "" ++ "Item (" ++ key ++ ")" ++ "" ++ err ++ "" ++ "" ) ) var carrierRows = (ve.carrierErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Carrier" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var externalPoRows = (ve.externalPoErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "External PO" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var customerPartRows = (ve.customerPartErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Customer Part" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var totalRows = (ve.totalErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Total" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var shipToRows = (ve.shipToErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Ship To" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var allRows = itemRows ++ carrierRows ++ externalPoRows ++ customerPartRows ++ totalRows ++ shipToRows var validationHtml = if (sizeOf(allRows) > 0) "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ (allRows joinBy "") ++ "
TypeError
" else "Validation failed but no detailed errors available." var errorResolution = if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") if (isValidationFlow) "The validation failed because the P21 data and the EDI data do not match. Please correct the EDI data accordingly and resend the file." else do { var baseMsg = "The incoming request payload from " ++ sourceSystem ++ " failed validation." var steps = if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED") "\n 1. Compare the received payload against the API RAML/OAS schema — identify the non-conforming fields." ++ "\n 2. Check for missing mandatory fields, incorrect data types, or values outside allowed enumerations." ++ "\n 3. Validate the payload manually using a schema validator tool before resubmitting." ++ "\n 4. Notify the sending system (" ++ sourceSystem ++ ") team to fix the payload structure." else if (categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD") "\n 1. A required field is absent — review the schema to identify which field(s) are mandatory." ++ "\n 2. Coordinate with " ++ sourceSystem ++ " to ensure all required fields are populated before sending." ++ "\n 3. If the field is conditionally required, review the business rules applied in the flow." else if (categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR") "\n 1. The payload could not be parsed — verify the Content-Type header matches the actual payload format." ++ "\n 2. Check for special characters, BOM markers, or encoding issues (ensure UTF-8)." ++ "\n 3. Validate the raw message body for malformed JSON/XML syntax." else "\n 1. Review the full error description to identify the failing field or rule." ++ "\n 2. Validate the payload structure against the published API contract." ++ "\n 3. Engage the source system team to correct the data before resubmitting." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Resubmission is safe only after the payload has been corrected." } else if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "A P21 (Prophet 21) integration failure occurred on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (contains(lower(errDesc), "invalid column") or contains(lower(errDesc), "column")) "\n 1. An invalid or unrecognized column was referenced in the P21 transaction — review the column name in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify that the column exists in the target P21 table (e.g., TP_POHDR) and is spelled correctly." ++ "\n 3. Check if a recent P21 schema upgrade removed or renamed the column — re-align the integration mapping." ++ "\n 4. Confirm the column is available in the P21 version deployed in the " ++ safe(sysInfo.env, "current") ++ " environment." ++ "\n 5. Run the transaction manually in P21 with the same payload to reproduce and isolate the column issue." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "general exception")) "\n 1. P21 raised a general exception — capture the full error description and transaction reference from the logs." ++ "\n 2. Reproduce the transaction manually in P21 to identify the root cause." ++ "\n 3. Check P21 application logs for the matching timestamp and transaction ID." ++ "\n 4. Verify the P21 service is healthy and the target table/object is not locked." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "transaction")) "\n 1. The P21 transaction failed to process — check the transaction ID referenced in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify the transaction data conforms to P21 business rules and required field constraints." ++ "\n 3. Check if a prior transaction left the record in a locked or incomplete state." ++ "\n 4. Review the P21 event log for any associated warnings or preceding failures." else "\n 1. Capture the full error description and correlation ID and search P21 application logs." ++ "\n 2. Verify the P21 endpoint is reachable and the target object/table is accessible." ++ "\n 3. Confirm the integration payload structure matches the P21 expected schema." ++ "\n 4. Engage the P21 support team with the correlation ID and error detail if the issue persists." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit the transaction without confirming whether it was partially committed in P21." } else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") do { var baseMsg = "Authentication or authorization failure detected on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED") "\n 1. Verify that the client credentials (username/password or client ID/secret) are valid and have not expired." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the token endpoint URL and grant type are correctly configured in the connector." ++ "\n 3. Check if the credentials were recently rotated — update the secret manager entry and re-deploy." ++ "\n 4. Review the HTTP Authorization header format (Bearer vs Basic)." else if (categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED") "\n 1. The identity is authenticated but lacks permission — review role/scope assignments in the target system." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the API client has the required scopes granted in API Manager." ++ "\n 3. Check IP allowlist or policy restrictions applied on the API." else if (categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN") "\n 1. Token has expired or is malformed — verify the token refresh logic in the integration flow." ++ "\n 2. Ensure system clock is synchronized (NTP) — clock skew can invalidate JWT tokens." ++ "\n 3. Check token TTL settings in the OAuth provider and align the refresh interval." else "\n 1. Review security policy configuration in API Manager for this API." ++ "\n 2. Inspect request headers for correct Authorization values." ++ "\n 3. Contact the API owner if credentials or scopes need to be re-provisioned." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT expose credentials in logs. Escalate to the security team if repeated failures are observed." } else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") do { var baseMsg = "A connectivity failure occurred while communicating with " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. Verify that " ++ targetSystem ++ " is running and reachable from the Mule runtime network." ++ "\n 2. Check firewall rules and security group policies for the target endpoint." ++ "\n 3. Review the connector timeout settings — increase if the target is known to be slow." ++ "\n 4. Inspect " ++ targetSystem ++ " server logs for signs of overload or long processing times." else if (categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. The connection was established but the operation timed out mid-transfer." ++ "\n 2. Increase read/write timeout values in the HTTP/connector configuration." ++ "\n 3. Check payload size — large payloads may require streaming or chunked transfer." else if (categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "\n 1. Verify the TLS/SSL certificate of " ++ targetSystem ++ " is valid and not expired." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the certificate is trusted — add it to the Mule truststore if self-signed." ++ "\n 3. Confirm TLS protocol versions are compatible (TLS 1.2/1.3)." ++ "\n 4. Check mutual TLS (mTLS) configuration if client certificates are required." else if (categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED") "\n 1. All retry attempts have been exhausted — " ++ targetSystem ++ " may be consistently unavailable." ++ "\n 2. Review the Until Successful / retry policy settings and adjust retry count and interval." ++ "\n 3. Consider implementing a dead-letter queue for failed messages." ++ "\n 4. Alert the " ++ targetSystem ++ " operations team to investigate availability." else "\n 1. Confirm network connectivity between Mule runtime and " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Verify the endpoint URL, port, and protocol are correctly configured." ++ "\n 3. Check infrastructure health dashboards for any active incidents." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n If the issue is intermittent, check for network instability or scheduled maintenance windows." } else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "The request was well-formed but could not be fulfilled by " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND") "\n 1. The requested resource does not exist on " ++ targetSystem ++ " — verify the resource ID or URI path." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the resource was not deleted or archived in the target system." ++ "\n 3. Check for environment-specific differences (Dev vs Prod resource IDs)." else if (categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") "\n 1. The HTTP method used is not supported for this endpoint — review the API documentation." ++ "\n 2. Verify the connector or HTTP request component is configured with the correct HTTP verb." else if (categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "\n 1. Rate limit has been exceeded for " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Implement exponential back-off and retry logic in the flow." ++ "\n 3. Review the API rate limit policy and consider requesting a quota increase." ++ "\n 4. Batch or throttle outbound requests to stay within allowed limits." else if (categoryId == "CONFLICT") "\n 1. A conflicting resource state was detected — the resource may already exist or be locked." ++ "\n 2. Check for duplicate transaction IDs or idempotency key conflicts." ++ "\n 3. Implement idempotency checks before sending create/update requests." else "\n 1. Review the HTTP status code and error description for specific guidance." ++ "\n 2. Verify the request parameters, headers, and body match the API contract." ++ "\n 3. Consult the " ++ targetSystem ++ " API documentation for this endpoint." --- baseMsg ++ steps } else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") do { var baseMsg = "A data transformation or mapping error occurred in the integration flow." var steps = if (categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED") "\n 1. Review the DataWeave script at the failing Transform component." ++ "\n 2. Validate that all referenced fields exist in the input payload — use 'default' guards for optional fields." ++ "\n 3. Test the mapping in DataWeave Playground or Anypoint Studio with a sample payload." ++ "\n 4. Add null-safety checks: use '?' operator and 'default' to handle missing or null values." else if (categoryId == "COERCION") "\n 1. A type coercion failed — verify the data type of the field being cast (e.g., String to Number)." ++ "\n 2. Check for empty strings, null values, or non-numeric characters in numeric fields." ++ "\n 3. Add explicit type guards before coercion: if (value is String and not isEmpty(value))." else "\n 1. Identify the failing Transform component using the Correlation ID in the application logs." ++ "\n 2. Log the input payload just before the transform to capture the actual data shape." ++ "\n 3. Verify the mapping handles all edge cases (null, empty, unexpected formats)." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Check if the source payload structure changed — upstream schema changes often cause silent mapping breaks." } else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "The request did not conform to the API specification." ++ "\n 1. Verify the request URI, HTTP method, headers, and query parameters match the RAML/OAS definition." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the Content-Type and Accept headers are set correctly." ++ "\n 3. Validate the request payload against the schema defined in the API spec." ++ "\n 4. Consult the API documentation or contact the API owner for the correct request format." else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "The integration flow could not route the message to its intended destination." ++ "\n 1. Verify that the target flow name is correct and the flow is deployed and active." ++ "\n 2. Check the routing logic (Choice/Scatter-Gather) for conditions that may not match the current payload." ++ "\n 3. Review the flow-ref component configuration for typos in the flow name." ++ "\n 4. Confirm there are no missing or disabled flows in the deployed application." else "An unexpected system error occurred during processing." ++ "\n 1. Capture the Correlation ID and search the application logs for the full stack trace." ++ "\n 2. Check Anypoint Monitoring or Runtime Manager for memory, CPU, or thread pool alerts." ++ "\n 3. Review recent deployments or configuration changes that may have introduced the issue." ++ "\n 4. If the issue persists, raise a support ticket with the Correlation ID, error type, and timestamp." var errorDescFull = if (isValidationFlow) validationHtml else (errResp.description default errDesc default "Unexpected error") as String ++ "\n\nCorrelation ID: " ++ (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) ++ "\nHTTP Status: " ++ ((errResp.statusCode default vars.httpStatus default 500) as String) ++ "\nStatus Message: " ++ (errResp.statusMessage default errorTypeValue) ++ "\nTimestamp: " ++ (errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"})) var corrId = if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId, uuid()) else (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) var data = { flowDirection: flowDirection, documentType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else safe(integration."integration-type", "API"), appName: p('api.name') default "Mule Application", transactionType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else (vars.systemInformation."integration-type" default "API"), environment: safe(sysInfo.env, p('mule.env')), flowName: safe(vars.flowName, "Global Error Handler"), route: sourceSystem ++ " → Mule → " ++ targetSystem, partnerName: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.senderId) else sourceSystem, errorTitle: errorTitle, bannerColor: bannerColor, errorType: errorTypeValue, errorCategory: errorCategory, status: "FAILED", errorCode: if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else errId, message: if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else "An unexpected error occurred during integration processing.", errorResolution: errorResolution, errorDescription: errorDescFull, transmissionId: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId) else (vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default corrId), keyLabel: if (isValidationFlow) "PO Number" else "Correlation ID", key: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.poNumber) else corrId, timestamp: errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}) } var template = readUrl("classpath://templates/error-template.html", "text/plain") --- template replace /\$\{(\w+)\}/ with ((m) -> (data[m[1]] as String) default "" )

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO: Start Flow
logger.message: Start: Global Error Handler: GENERIC ERROR

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if(error.errorType.identifier == "BAD_REQUEST") (400) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "NOT_FOUND" and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload))(404) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "NOT_FOUND" and isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload))(504) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") (405) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "UNAUTHORIZED" or error.errorType.identifier == "FORBIDDEN") (401) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT") (504) else if(error.errorType.identifier == "BAD_GATEWAY") (502) else if (!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode default ""))(error.errorMessage.attributes.statusCode) else if (!isEmpty(attributes.statusCode))(attributes.statusCode) else (500)

%dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::Strings --- { "source": vars.integration.source, "target": vars.integration.target, "env": capitalize(p('mule.env')), "integration-type": vars.integration."integration-type"
}

%dw 2.0 output application/json var explictHandlerCodes = p('explicitcodes') --- { "correlationId": correlationId default uuid(), "statusCode": (if ( explictHandlerCodes contains vars.httpStatus ) (vars.httpStatus) else (error.errorMessage.payload.statusCode default vars.httpStatus)) default 500, "statusMessage": (if ( explictHandlerCodes contains vars.httpStatus ) ((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier)) else (error.errorMessage.payload.statusMessage)) default (error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier), "description": (if ( explictHandlerCodes contains vars.httpStatus ) (if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) contains "RETRY_EXHAUSTED")(error.description) else error.detailedDescription) else (error.errorMessage.payload.description)) default (if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) contains "RETRY_EXHAUSTED")(error.description) else error.detailedDescription), "timestamp": (if(explictHandlerCodes contains vars.httpStatus) ((now() as String {format : "yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss"}) ++ " UTC") else (error.errorMessage.payload.errorDateTime)) default ((now() as String {format : "yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss"}) ++ " UTC"), }

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v var errResp = vars.errorResponse default {} var sysInfo = vars.systemInformation default {} var integration = vars.integration default {} var cdm = (vars.initialPayload default [])[0].b2bMessage default {} var cdmHeader = cdm.header default {} var isValidationFlow = vars.isValid != null var errNs = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM" else (error.errorType.namespace default "UNKNOWN") var errId = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else (error.errorType.identifier default "ERROR") var errDesc = if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else (error.detailedDescription default error.description default "Unexpected error") var suppressed = if (isValidationFlow) null else (error.suppressedErrors[0] default null) var suppNs = suppressed.errorType.namespace default "" var suppId = suppressed.errorType.identifier default "" var sourceSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "APM" else safe(integration.source, "UNKNOWN") var targetSystem = if (isValidationFlow) "P21" else safe(integration.target, "UNKNOWN") var flowDirection = if (lower(sourceSystem) == "apm") "INBOUND" else "OUTBOUND" var categoryNs = if (suppressed != null and suppNs != "") suppNs else errNs var categoryId = if (suppressed != null and suppId != "") suppId else errId var errorTypeValue = if (isValidationFlow) "CUSTOM:VALIDATION_ERROR" else if (suppressed != null and (suppNs != "" or suppId != "")) (if (suppNs != "") suppNs else "UNKNOWN") ++ ":" ++ (if (suppId != "") suppId else "ERROR") else if (!isEmpty(errResp.statusMessage default "")) errResp.statusMessage as String else errNs ++ ":" ++ errId var errorCategory = if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION" else if (categoryNs == "CUSTOM" and categoryId == "P21_FAILED") "P21_ERROR" else if (categoryNs == "APIKIT" and suppressed == null) "APIKIT" else if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN" or categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED" or categoryNs == "OAUTH2" or categoryNs == "JWT" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and categoryId == "SECURITY")) "SECURITY" else if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED" or categoryId == "INVALID_INPUT" or categoryId == "UNRECOGNIZED_FIELD" or categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD" or categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR" or categoryNs == "VALIDATION" or categoryNs == "JSON" or categoryNs == "XML" or categoryNs == "CSV") "VALIDATION" else if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "BAD_GATEWAY" or categoryId == "CONNECTIVITY" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED" or categoryId == "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE" or categoryId == "REMOTELY_CLOSED" or categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "CONNECTIVITY" else if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND" or categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" or categoryId == "NOT_ACCEPTABLE" or categoryId == "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" or categoryId == "CONFLICT" or categoryId == "GONE" or categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "CLIENT_ERROR" else if (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "COERCION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED" or (categoryNs == "MULE" and (categoryId == "TRANSFORMATION" or categoryId == "EXPRESSION"))) "TRANSFORMATION" else if (categoryId == "ROUTING" or categoryId == "COMPOSITE_ROUTING" or categoryId == "FLOW_NOT_FOUND") "ROUTING" else "GENERIC" var errorTitle = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "P21 Integration Error" else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "API Error" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "Security Error" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "Validation Error" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "Connectivity Error" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "Client Error" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "Transformation Error" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "Routing Error" else "System Error" var bannerColor = if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") "#0369a1" else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") "#f59e0b" else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") "#f97316" else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") "#6366f1" else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") "#06b6d4" else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "#0ea5e9" else "#ef4444" var ve = vars.isValid.validationErrors default {} var itemRows = flatten( (ve.itemErrors default {}) pluck ((value, key) -> (value default []) map (err) -> "" ++ "Item (" ++ key ++ ")" ++ "" ++ err ++ "" ++ "" ) ) var carrierRows = (ve.carrierErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Carrier" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var externalPoRows = (ve.externalPoErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "External PO" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var customerPartRows = (ve.customerPartErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Customer Part" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var totalRows = (ve.totalErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Total" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var shipToRows = (ve.shipToErrors default []) map (e) -> "" ++ "Ship To" ++ "" ++ e ++ "" var allRows = itemRows ++ carrierRows ++ externalPoRows ++ customerPartRows ++ totalRows ++ shipToRows var validationHtml = if (sizeOf(allRows) > 0) "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ (allRows joinBy "") ++ "
TypeError
" else "Validation failed but no detailed errors available." var errorResolution = if (errorCategory == "VALIDATION") if (isValidationFlow) "The validation failed because the P21 data and the EDI data do not match. Please correct the EDI data accordingly and resend the file." else do { var baseMsg = "The incoming request payload from " ++ sourceSystem ++ " failed validation." var steps = if (categoryId == "BAD_REQUEST" or categoryId == "SCHEMA_NOT_HONOURED") "\n 1. Compare the received payload against the API RAML/OAS schema — identify the non-conforming fields." ++ "\n 2. Check for missing mandatory fields, incorrect data types, or values outside allowed enumerations." ++ "\n 3. Validate the payload manually using a schema validator tool before resubmitting." ++ "\n 4. Notify the sending system (" ++ sourceSystem ++ ") team to fix the payload structure." else if (categoryId == "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD") "\n 1. A required field is absent — review the schema to identify which field(s) are mandatory." ++ "\n 2. Coordinate with " ++ sourceSystem ++ " to ensure all required fields are populated before sending." ++ "\n 3. If the field is conditionally required, review the business rules applied in the flow." else if (categoryId == "PARSE_ERROR") "\n 1. The payload could not be parsed — verify the Content-Type header matches the actual payload format." ++ "\n 2. Check for special characters, BOM markers, or encoding issues (ensure UTF-8)." ++ "\n 3. Validate the raw message body for malformed JSON/XML syntax." else "\n 1. Review the full error description to identify the failing field or rule." ++ "\n 2. Validate the payload structure against the published API contract." ++ "\n 3. Engage the source system team to correct the data before resubmitting." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Resubmission is safe only after the payload has been corrected." } else if (errorCategory == "P21_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "A P21 (Prophet 21) integration failure occurred on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (contains(lower(errDesc), "invalid column") or contains(lower(errDesc), "column")) "\n 1. An invalid or unrecognized column was referenced in the P21 transaction — review the column name in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify that the column exists in the target P21 table (e.g., TP_POHDR) and is spelled correctly." ++ "\n 3. Check if a recent P21 schema upgrade removed or renamed the column — re-align the integration mapping." ++ "\n 4. Confirm the column is available in the P21 version deployed in the " ++ safe(sysInfo.env, "current") ++ " environment." ++ "\n 5. Run the transaction manually in P21 with the same payload to reproduce and isolate the column issue." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "general exception")) "\n 1. P21 raised a general exception — capture the full error description and transaction reference from the logs." ++ "\n 2. Reproduce the transaction manually in P21 to identify the root cause." ++ "\n 3. Check P21 application logs for the matching timestamp and transaction ID." ++ "\n 4. Verify the P21 service is healthy and the target table/object is not locked." else if (contains(lower(errDesc), "transaction")) "\n 1. The P21 transaction failed to process — check the transaction ID referenced in the error description." ++ "\n 2. Verify the transaction data conforms to P21 business rules and required field constraints." ++ "\n 3. Check if a prior transaction left the record in a locked or incomplete state." ++ "\n 4. Review the P21 event log for any associated warnings or preceding failures." else "\n 1. Capture the full error description and correlation ID and search P21 application logs." ++ "\n 2. Verify the P21 endpoint is reachable and the target object/table is accessible." ++ "\n 3. Confirm the integration payload structure matches the P21 expected schema." ++ "\n 4. Engage the P21 support team with the correlation ID and error detail if the issue persists." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit the transaction without confirming whether it was partially committed in P21." } else if (errorCategory == "SECURITY") do { var baseMsg = "Authentication or authorization failure detected on the " ++ sourceSystem ++ " → " ++ targetSystem ++ " route." var steps = if (categoryId == "UNAUTHORIZED" or categoryId == "AUTHENTICATION_FAILED") "\n 1. Verify that the client credentials (username/password or client ID/secret) are valid and have not expired." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the token endpoint URL and grant type are correctly configured in the connector." ++ "\n 3. Check if the credentials were recently rotated — update the secret manager entry and re-deploy." ++ "\n 4. Review the HTTP Authorization header format (Bearer vs Basic)." else if (categoryId == "FORBIDDEN" or categoryId == "ACCESS_DENIED") "\n 1. The identity is authenticated but lacks permission — review role/scope assignments in the target system." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the API client has the required scopes granted in API Manager." ++ "\n 3. Check IP allowlist or policy restrictions applied on the API." else if (categoryId == "TOKEN_EXPIRED" or categoryId == "INVALID_TOKEN") "\n 1. Token has expired or is malformed — verify the token refresh logic in the integration flow." ++ "\n 2. Ensure system clock is synchronized (NTP) — clock skew can invalidate JWT tokens." ++ "\n 3. Check token TTL settings in the OAuth provider and align the refresh interval." else "\n 1. Review security policy configuration in API Manager for this API." ++ "\n 2. Inspect request headers for correct Authorization values." ++ "\n 3. Contact the API owner if credentials or scopes need to be re-provisioned." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Do NOT expose credentials in logs. Escalate to the security team if repeated failures are observed." } else if (errorCategory == "CONNECTIVITY") do { var baseMsg = "A connectivity failure occurred while communicating with " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "CONNECTION_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. Verify that " ++ targetSystem ++ " is running and reachable from the Mule runtime network." ++ "\n 2. Check firewall rules and security group policies for the target endpoint." ++ "\n 3. Review the connector timeout settings — increase if the target is known to be slow." ++ "\n 4. Inspect " ++ targetSystem ++ " server logs for signs of overload or long processing times." else if (categoryId == "READ_TIMEOUT" or categoryId == "WRITE_TIMEOUT") "\n 1. The connection was established but the operation timed out mid-transfer." ++ "\n 2. Increase read/write timeout values in the HTTP/connector configuration." ++ "\n 3. Check payload size — large payloads may require streaming or chunked transfer." else if (categoryId == "SSL_ERROR") "\n 1. Verify the TLS/SSL certificate of " ++ targetSystem ++ " is valid and not expired." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the certificate is trusted — add it to the Mule truststore if self-signed." ++ "\n 3. Confirm TLS protocol versions are compatible (TLS 1.2/1.3)." ++ "\n 4. Check mutual TLS (mTLS) configuration if client certificates are required." else if (categoryId == "RETRY_EXHAUSTED") "\n 1. All retry attempts have been exhausted — " ++ targetSystem ++ " may be consistently unavailable." ++ "\n 2. Review the Until Successful / retry policy settings and adjust retry count and interval." ++ "\n 3. Consider implementing a dead-letter queue for failed messages." ++ "\n 4. Alert the " ++ targetSystem ++ " operations team to investigate availability." else "\n 1. Confirm network connectivity between Mule runtime and " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Verify the endpoint URL, port, and protocol are correctly configured." ++ "\n 3. Check infrastructure health dashboards for any active incidents." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n If the issue is intermittent, check for network instability or scheduled maintenance windows." } else if (errorCategory == "CLIENT_ERROR") do { var baseMsg = "The request was well-formed but could not be fulfilled by " ++ targetSystem ++ "." var steps = if (categoryId == "NOT_FOUND") "\n 1. The requested resource does not exist on " ++ targetSystem ++ " — verify the resource ID or URI path." ++ "\n 2. Confirm the resource was not deleted or archived in the target system." ++ "\n 3. Check for environment-specific differences (Dev vs Prod resource IDs)." else if (categoryId == "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") "\n 1. The HTTP method used is not supported for this endpoint — review the API documentation." ++ "\n 2. Verify the connector or HTTP request component is configured with the correct HTTP verb." else if (categoryId == "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS") "\n 1. Rate limit has been exceeded for " ++ targetSystem ++ "." ++ "\n 2. Implement exponential back-off and retry logic in the flow." ++ "\n 3. Review the API rate limit policy and consider requesting a quota increase." ++ "\n 4. Batch or throttle outbound requests to stay within allowed limits." else if (categoryId == "CONFLICT") "\n 1. A conflicting resource state was detected — the resource may already exist or be locked." ++ "\n 2. Check for duplicate transaction IDs or idempotency key conflicts." ++ "\n 3. Implement idempotency checks before sending create/update requests." else "\n 1. Review the HTTP status code and error description for specific guidance." ++ "\n 2. Verify the request parameters, headers, and body match the API contract." ++ "\n 3. Consult the " ++ targetSystem ++ " API documentation for this endpoint." --- baseMsg ++ steps } else if (errorCategory == "TRANSFORMATION") do { var baseMsg = "A data transformation or mapping error occurred in the integration flow." var steps = if (categoryId == "EXPRESSION" or categoryId == "SCRIPTING_FAILED") "\n 1. Review the DataWeave script at the failing Transform component." ++ "\n 2. Validate that all referenced fields exist in the input payload — use 'default' guards for optional fields." ++ "\n 3. Test the mapping in DataWeave Playground or Anypoint Studio with a sample payload." ++ "\n 4. Add null-safety checks: use '?' operator and 'default' to handle missing or null values." else if (categoryId == "COERCION") "\n 1. A type coercion failed — verify the data type of the field being cast (e.g., String to Number)." ++ "\n 2. Check for empty strings, null values, or non-numeric characters in numeric fields." ++ "\n 3. Add explicit type guards before coercion: if (value is String and not isEmpty(value))." else "\n 1. Identify the failing Transform component using the Correlation ID in the application logs." ++ "\n 2. Log the input payload just before the transform to capture the actual data shape." ++ "\n 3. Verify the mapping handles all edge cases (null, empty, unexpected formats)." --- baseMsg ++ steps ++ "\n\n Check if the source payload structure changed — upstream schema changes often cause silent mapping breaks." } else if (errorCategory == "APIKIT") "The request did not conform to the API specification." ++ "\n 1. Verify the request URI, HTTP method, headers, and query parameters match the RAML/OAS definition." ++ "\n 2. Ensure the Content-Type and Accept headers are set correctly." ++ "\n 3. Validate the request payload against the schema defined in the API spec." ++ "\n 4. Consult the API documentation or contact the API owner for the correct request format." else if (errorCategory == "ROUTING") "The integration flow could not route the message to its intended destination." ++ "\n 1. Verify that the target flow name is correct and the flow is deployed and active." ++ "\n 2. Check the routing logic (Choice/Scatter-Gather) for conditions that may not match the current payload." ++ "\n 3. Review the flow-ref component configuration for typos in the flow name." ++ "\n 4. Confirm there are no missing or disabled flows in the deployed application." else "An unexpected system error occurred during processing." ++ "\n 1. Capture the Correlation ID and search the application logs for the full stack trace." ++ "\n 2. Check Anypoint Monitoring or Runtime Manager for memory, CPU, or thread pool alerts." ++ "\n 3. Review recent deployments or configuration changes that may have introduced the issue." ++ "\n 4. If the issue persists, raise a support ticket with the Correlation ID, error type, and timestamp." var errorDescFull = if (isValidationFlow) validationHtml else (errResp.description default errDesc default "Unexpected error") as String ++ "\n\nCorrelation ID: " ++ (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) ++ "\nHTTP Status: " ++ ((errResp.statusCode default vars.httpStatus default 500) as String) ++ "\nStatus Message: " ++ (errResp.statusMessage default errorTypeValue) ++ "\nTimestamp: " ++ (errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"})) var corrId = if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId, uuid()) else (errResp.correlationId default correlationId default uuid()) var data = { flowDirection: flowDirection, documentType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else safe(integration."integration-type", "API"), appName: p('api.name') default "Mule Application", transactionType: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.documentType, "810") else (vars.systemInformation."integration-type" default "API"), environment: safe(sysInfo.env, p('mule.env')), flowName: safe(vars.flowName, "Global Error Handler"), route: sourceSystem ++ " → Mule → " ++ targetSystem, partnerName: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.senderId) else sourceSystem, errorTitle: errorTitle, bannerColor: bannerColor, errorType: errorTypeValue, errorCategory: errorCategory, status: "FAILED", errorCode: if (isValidationFlow) "VALIDATION_ERROR" else errId, message: if (isValidationFlow) "Validation failed while processing transaction." else "An unexpected error occurred during integration processing.", errorResolution: errorResolution, errorDescription: errorDescFull, transmissionId: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.transmissionId) else (vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default corrId), keyLabel: if (isValidationFlow) "PO Number" else "Correlation ID", key: if (isValidationFlow) safe(cdmHeader.poNumber) else corrId, timestamp: errResp.timestamp default (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}) } var template = readUrl("classpath://templates/error-template.html", "text/plain") --- template replace /\$\{(\w+)\}/ with ((m) -> (data[m[1]] as String) default "" )
